---
name: I DEMAND CHEESE
about: You want something random (Ex. cheese)
title: "[FEATURE (I DEMAND CHEESE)]"

---

**What do you want from my valuable time you whiny little child?**
- Add taskbar settings.

**Why should I care?**
- It unifies more personalization settings into one place.

**Tell me more about this "creative" idea you have**
- I want to see stuff like taskbar settings in the app.
- Can you give me a wallpaper changer?

**Mockup**
If possible, show me your vision so that I don't waste time catering to you saying "MOVE IT UP 1 PIXEL".
The mockup is optional but you can't complain if you don't give me one and it doesn't look how you envisioned it to look.
